commands.epicfight.skill.add.failed: Unable to add this skill (skill already applied)
commands.epicfight.skill.remove.failed: Unable to remove this skill (skill does not exist)
commands.epicfight.skill.clear.failed: Target has no skills to remove
gamerule.weightPenalty: Weight Penalty applied to Attack Speed.
gamerule.disableEntityUI: Turn off health bar and target indicator for all players
skill.epicfight.battojutsu.tooltip: Unleash your blade at blinding speeds! If cast while sprinting, You slash forwards, slicing enemies in your path.
skill.epicfight.steel_whirlwind.tooltip: Cleave forwards and decimate your enemies! This can ability be charged, increasing attack range and speed.
skill.epicfight.the_guillotine.tooltip: Execute your target with a hefty blow. Executes if the target has less than %s health.
skill.epicfight.grasping_spire.tooltip: Stab through your enemy to pull them in. Successfully hitting an enemy will perform a second strike, knocking them back based on how many enemies were hit.
skill.epicfight.sweeping_edge.tooltip: Cleave nearby enemies with a powerful slash.
skill.epicfight.relentless_combo.tooltip: Release a devastating flurry of blows!
skill.epicfight.sharp_stab.tooltip: Follow up your attacks with a swift and precise stab ignoring the enemy's guard.
skill.epicfight.eviscerate.tooltip: Tear into the enemy with a savage stab. Successfully hitting an enemy will rip out the dagger, dealing critical damage.
skill.epicfight.blade_rush.tooltip: Slash through your enemy, applying Instability for 5 seconds. Reaching 3 stacks of Instability will execute the target.
skill.epicfight.wrathful_lighting.toolti: Invoke lightning to smite nearby enemies! Has a chance to change the weather.
skill.epicfight.tsunami.tooltip: Draw forth the power of the tides and surge forward! Dash distance increased when raining or underwater.
skill.epicfight.everlasting_allegiance.t: Recall your thrown trident, damaging all enemies in it's path.
skill.epicfight.stamina_pillager.tooltip: Regain %s%% of missing stamina when killing your target.
skill.epicfight.demolition_leap.tooltip: Gather energy to launch yourself into a targeted direction, reducing next fall damage by 50%.
epicfight.tip.weight: Weight shortens stun, raises skill stamina use, and slows attack speed, especially on fast items.
epicfight.tip.stun_armor: Stun Armor extends the time between stuns, boosting overall resilience and defense.
epicfight.tip.knockback: The Knockback enchantment functions to amplify the stun duration upon impact.
epicfight.tip.two_hand_weapon: Two-handed weapons can't be used in the offhand, limiting them to single-handed or dual-wielded options.
epicfight.tip.skill_books: Skills are found in dungeon books or sporadically drop from hostile mobs, categorized into Dodge, Guard, Mobility, Revelation, and Passive.
epicfight.tip.sharpness: The Sharpness enchantment augments the damage inflicted by every type of attack.
epicfight.tip.impact: Impact increases the total stun time for the target hit.
epicfight.tip.blocking: While blocking a hit, you get stunned for a short time.
epicfight.tip.parrying: To learn the Parrying skill, you must first acquire the Guard skill.
epicfight.tip.demolition_leap: To acquire Demolition Leap, you must defeat the Ender Dragon.
epicfight.tip.temples: Uchigatanas, akin to skill books, can be discovered in Desert Temples or Jungle Temples. These rare weapons are not craftable.
epicfight.tip.combat_mode: Switch between mining and combat modes by pressing it's default key, 'R'.
